パッケージ gov.nist.javax.sip.parser

インタフェースの概要
ParseExceptionListener A listener interface that enables customization of parse error handling.
SIPMessageListener Interface that provides methods for processing good and bad messages for the PipelinedMessageParser.
TokenNames A grab bag of SIP Token names.
TokenTypes  
 

クラスの概要
AcceptEncodingParser Accept-Encoding SIP (HTTP) Header parser.
AcceptLanguageParser Parser for Accept Language Headers.
AcceptParser Parser for Accept header.
AddressParser Parser for addresses.
AlertInfoParser Parser for AlertInfo header.
AllowEventsParser Parser for AllowEvents header.
AllowParser Parser for Allow header.
AuthenticationInfoParser Parser for Authentication-Info header.
AuthorizationParser Parser for authorization headers.
CallIDParser Parser for CALL ID header.
CallInfoParser Parser for CallInfo header.
ChallengeParser Parser for the challenge portion of the authentication header.
ContactParser A parser for The SIP contact header.
ContentDispositionParser Parser for ContentLanguage header.
ContentEncodingParser Parser for ContentLanguage header.
ContentLanguageParser Parser for ContentLanguage header.
ContentLengthParser Parser for Content-Length Header.
ContentTypeParser Parser for content type header.
CSeqParser Parser for CSeq headers.
DateParser Parser for SIP Date field.
ErrorInfoParser Parser for ErrorInfo header.
EventParser Parser for Event header.
ExpiresParser Parser for SIP Expires Parser.
FromParser From header parser.
HeaderParser Generic header parser class.
InReplyToParser Parser for InReplyTo header.
Lexer Lexer class for the parser.
MaxForwardsParser Parser for Max Forwards Header.
MimeVersionParser Parser for MimeVersion header.
MinExpiresParser Parser for MinExpires header.
OrganizationParser Parser for Organization header.
ParametersParser parameters parser header.
Parser Base parser class.
ParserFactory A factory class that does a name lookup on a registered parser and returns a header parser for the given name.
Pipeline Input class for the pipelined parser.
PipelinedMsgParser This implements a pipelined message parser suitable for use with a stream - oriented input such as TCP.
PriorityParser Parser for Priority header.
ProxyAuthenticateParser Parser for ProxyAuthenticate headers.
ProxyAuthorizationParser Parser for ProxyAuthorization headers.
ProxyRequireParser Parser for ProxyRequire header.
RAckParser Parser for RAck header.
ReasonParser Parser for Reason header.
RecordRouteParser Parser for a list of route headers.
ReferToParser To Header parser.
ReplyToParser Parser for a list of RelpyTo headers.
RequireParser Parser for Require header.
RetryAfterParser Parser for RetryAfter header.
RouteParser Parser for a list of route headers.
RSeqParser Parser for RSeq header.
ServerParser Parser for Server header.
StatusLineParser Parser for the SIP status line.
StringMsgParser Parse SIP message and parts of SIP messages such as URI's etc from memory and return a structure.
SubjectParser Parser for Subject header.
SubscriptionStateParser Parser for SubscriptionState header.
SupportedParser Parser for Supported header.
TimeStampParser Parser for TimeStamp header.
ToParser To Header parser.
UnsupportedParser Parser for Unsupported header.
URLParser Parser For SIP and Tel URLs.
UserAgentParser Parser for UserAgent header.
ViaParser Parser for via headers.
WarningParser Parser for Warning header.
WWWAuthenticateParser Parser for WWW authenitcate header.
